2a: Pre- Procedure Image description.Pelvicalyceal system: Dilated with maintained cupping of calyces
2a: Pre- Procedure Image description.Ureter: Right upper ureter is mildly dilated. And delayed excretion on the left ureter.
2a: Pre- Procedure Image description.Urinary bladder: Distended and normally opacified by contrast. No obvious irregularity of wall / filling defect seen.

2b: Post Procedure Image description.DJ stent/ PCN tube visualised: DJ stent visualised on right side

3a: Pre-procedure validity of reports.Reasoning (2): Pre-procedure anatomical staging is inconsistently assessed/visible across IVP reports; stones and calyceal changes are documented but are not entirely mirrored in all comparative image pages.

3b: Post-procedure validity of reports.Reasoning (2): Post-procedure KUB X-ray and report confirm the presence and placement of a DJ stent on the right side, without abnormal radio-opaque shadows in urinary structures.

3: Procedure code and STG alignment.Reasoning: No valid pre-procedure IVP (staging aside,  unconfirmed renditometry) reported for alignment; valid POST X-ray KUB aligns with package.
3: Procedure code and STG alignment.Reason for deviation from STG (to be map: Correct post-op X-ray (KUB) with DJ stent visualisation documented, but pre-procedure IVP screening missing despite expectations.
